SMS Consent Documentation

Guest Consent Process

Documentation of our transparent guest consent process for SMS communications, ensuring compliance with A2P 10DLC requirements.

9:41•••100%
Join Sarah & Mike's Wedding

SMS Notifications

Get wedding updates, RSVP confirmations, and event reminders via text message.

What you'll receive:
  • • Event updates & changes
  • • RSVP confirmations
  • • Schedule reminders
Reply STOP to opt out anytime
✓ Yes, send me SMS updates
Continue without SMS

Clear Consent Process

Explicit Opt-In Required
Guests must actively consent to receive SMS messages before joining the wedding communication platform.
Clear Purpose Statement
Guests understand they will receive wedding-related updates, RSVP confirmations, and event reminders.
Easy Opt-Out Process
Guests can easily unsubscribe by replying "STOP" to any message or through the app settings.
Consent Verification
Digital record of consent is maintained for each guest with timestamp and IP address.

A2P 10DLC Compliance

This consent process meets all A2P 10DLC requirements for wedding communication platforms. Guests provide explicit, informed consent before receiving any SMS communications, and all consent records are properly maintained for audit purposes.

Use Case: Mixed - Wedding event coordination and guest communication
Message Types: Event updates, RSVP confirmations, schedule reminders

Example Messages

Welcome Message
"Welcome to Sarah & Mike's wedding! 🎉 You'll receive updates about the ceremony, reception, and other wedding details. Reply STOP to opt out anytime."
Event Reminder
"Reminder: Sarah & Mike's ceremony starts at 4 PM tomorrow at Sunset Gardens. See you there! Reply STOP to unsubscribe."
Legal Documentation

Policies & Terms

Our commitment to transparency and compliance through clear policies and terms of service.

SMS Consent Policy

Detailed policy explaining how we obtain and manage guest consent for SMS communications.

Read Policy →

Privacy Policy

Comprehensive privacy policy covering data collection, usage, and protection practices.

Read Policy →

Terms of Service

Terms and conditions governing the use of our wedding management platform.

Read Terms →

SMS Consent Policy

Effective Date: January 1, 2025

1. Consent Collection

Unveil collects explicit consent from wedding guests before sending any SMS messages. Guests must actively opt-in by providing their phone number and agreeing to receive wedding-related communications through our platform.

2. Message Types

Consented guests will receive the following types of messages:

  • • RSVP confirmations and reminders
  • • Wedding ceremony and reception updates
  • • Schedule changes and important announcements
  • • Photo sharing notifications

3. Opt-Out Process

Guests can opt out of SMS communications at any time by:

  • • Replying "STOP" to any SMS message
  • • Updating preferences in the Unveil app
  • • Contacting our support team

4. Data Protection

Phone numbers and consent records are securely stored and never shared with third parties for marketing purposes. All data is encrypted and handled in accordance with applicable privacy laws.

Privacy Policy

Effective Date: January 1, 2025

1. Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us, including phone numbers, names, email addresses, and RSVP responses. We also collect photos and messages shared through our platform.

2. How We Use Your Information

Your information is used to facilitate wedding communication, manage RSVPs, share photos and memories, and send relevant updates about wedding events.

3. Information Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes. Information is only shared with other wedding guests as intended by the platform functionality.

4. Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

Questions About Our Policies?

If you have any questions about our policies or practices, please contact us.

legal@sendunveil.com
